payload.last_assistant_message:
PR created: https://github.com/adobe-ai-pod/mas/pull/16

Changes implemented and included:
- Removed `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from `renderLayout()` in `plans.js`
- Added `<slot name="footer">` inside `.body` div to preserve CTA rendering
- Removed 3 dead CSS rules targeting `footer` in `variantStyle`
